title: xanthium albinum subsp. ripicola
intro: Xanthium albinum subsp. ripicola, also known as the water-burdock or river cocklebur, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant's medicinal properties are said to have various health benefits, including reducing swelling and pain, as well as possessing antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Xanthium albinum subsp. ripicola can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
